entry.title: My Fourth Review
entry.content: Following is a review of my favorite mechanical keyboard.

entry.title: My Third Review
entry.content: Following is a review of my favorite mechanical keyboard.

entry.title: Start Cmput 404 project
entry.summary:
Window:

pip install virtualenv python -m venv ./venv venv\Scripts\activate.bat python3 -m pip install Django django-admin startproject todo_backend python3 manage.py startapp api python3 manage.py migrate python3 manage.py makemigrations api python3 manage.py sqlmigrate api 0001 python3 manage.py migrate python manage.py createsuperuser python …
entry.content:
Window:

pip install virtualenv python -m venv ./venv venv\Scripts\activate.bat python3 -m pip install Django django-admin startproject todo_backend python3 manage.py startapp api python3 manage.py migrate python3 manage.py makemigrations api python3 manage.py sqlmigrate api 0001 python3 manage.py migrate python manage.py createsuperuser python manage.py runserver python -m pip install djangorestframework

Linux:

pip install virtualenv virtualenv venv --python=python3.7 source venv/bin/activate python3 -m pip install Django django-admin startproject todo_backend python3 manage.py startapp api python3 manage.py migrate python3 manage.py makemigrations api python3 manage.py sqlmigrate api 0001 python3 manage.py migrate python manage.py createsuperuser python manage.py runserver python -m pip install djangorestframework
